case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. VERONICA WROTEN MS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WROTEN MS, VERONICA $12,319.88 PRINCIPAL, $630.85 INTEREST, $405.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,355.73, SEE SCANNED DOC
